output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?partner ?partnerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q2674710 wdt:P5000 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P161 wd:Q4617 .
  ?season wdt:P161 ?partner .
  ?partner wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?partner wdt:P106 ?occupation .
  ?occupation wdt:P279 * wd:Q28640 .
  FILTER(?partner != wd:Q4617)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?partner rdfs:label ?partnerLabel
    FILTER(lang(?partnerLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
LIMIT 10

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

SELECT ?partner ?partnerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q2674710 wdt:P5000 ?season.
  ?season wdt:P710 wd:Q4617.
  ?season p:P710 ?statement.
  ?statement ps:P710 wd:Q4617.
  ?statement pq:P4511 ?partner.
  OPTIONAL { ?partner rdfs:label ?partnerLabel FILTER (lang(?partnerLabel) = 'en') }
}
